reviews.review_title: Have to learn on the fly...
reviews.review_description: Needs a tutorial or help screen. Button layout, menu, or something like it would also be helpful. As well as a way to clear the screen of overlapping data. Idea is sound, but I'm having a hard time with paying $20 a month for something that doesn't quite work right... Will change my rating, if things change or improve. 3 stars
